name: saucedemo-test-automation
description: Automation testing framework for SauceDemo covering login and add-to-cart functionalities, including test case design, screenshot on failure, and an intentionally failing test scenario.

scripts.cy:run: cypress run && mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/*.json > cypress/reports/report.json && marge cypress/reports/report.json
scripts.cy:chrome: cypress run --browser chrome && mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/*.json > cypress/reports/report.json && marge cypress/reports/report.json
scripts.cy:firefox: cypress run --browser firefox && mochawesome-merge cypress/reports/*.json > cypress/reports/report.json && marge cypress/reports/report.json
